notes: NI Session Percussionist — hand percussion ensemble in Kontakt (cajon, bongos, djembe, shakers, tambourine etc.). CC 11 (Expression) controls global output level. Individual instrument slots are triggered across the key range — check the instrument's mapping view for exact key assignments. Quick Controls adjust mic blend and performance character. Right-click any knob → Learn MIDI CC to confirm assignments.

Modulation.description: Modulation — instrument-dependent (typically accent depth or variation)

Quick Control 1.description: Close Mic Level — direct mic on instruments (more punch and definition)

Quick Control 2.description: Room Mic Level — room ambience / hall blend

Quick Control 3.description: Overhead Mic Level — overhead/stereo spread of the ensemble

Quick Control 5.description: Attack Transient — transient shaper; higher = snappier attack punch

Quick Control 7.description: Humanise — random velocity and timing variation for natural feel

Quick Control 8.description: Bleed / Crosstalk — mic bleed between instruments (higher = more live room feel)
